$comment: Curated exceptions for tool/parity/symbol_lint.mjs (Bridge 2 — component/token symbol resolution). DEFAULT for any kit `mx:<Name>` that does not resolve to a real `class <Name>` in lib/ = FAIL. This file holds the only two kinds of documented escape: (1) componentAliases — the kit suggests a differently-named real class (retag the kit JSX when convenient so the alias can be dropped); (2) componentGaps — the kit suggests a component that has NO real class yet (design ahead of code), acknowledged here so --check passes while the gap is tracked. Keep MINIMAL — when in doubt, fix the kit or build the component instead of adding an entry.
$componentAliasesNote: Empty: the former MxBottomNavigationBar→MxBottomNav alias was eliminated at SOURCE by fixing tool/ui_kit_shots/component-map.json (bottom-nav→MxBottomNav) and re-exporting specs — the kit now emits the real class name directly. Prefer fixing component-map over adding an alias here.
$componentGapsNote: Empty: MxSectionHeader (the kit section-head, referenced by specs 04,05,11,13,18,19,23) was BUILT at lib/presentation/shared/widgets/mx_section_header.dart, so the kit's mx:MxSectionHeader now resolves to a real class. 18-stats/mastery-section uses it (the only keyed section-head node); the other screens' (unkeyed) section headers can migrate to it incrementally.
